sources.behavior: spawn_agent validates a task name and message and returns an addressable child independently from later waits.
sources.keydex_decision: Adopt immediate handle creation followed by a separate wait policy; expose only type and task to the main model.

sources.behavior: send_message delivers input to a running child while followup_task can start another turn for an idle child.
sources.keydex_decision: Keep steer and resume as separate operations, but do not expose agent-to-agent addressing tools.

sources.behavior: wait_agent observes mailbox or status changes and terminal outcomes; related handlers list, close, or interrupt agents.
sources.keydex_decision: Adopt notification-based terminal waiting; reject mailbox, agent tree, and model-visible control tool sets.

sources.behavior: The tool contract describes canonical task paths, nested agents, and context forking.
sources.keydex_decision: Reject canonical paths, nested delegation, and model-selectable context fork parameters in V1.

sources.behavior: The root thread shares agent registry, residency, execution limiting, and rollout budget through AgentControl.
sources.keydex_decision: Adopt parent-scoped ownership only; reject a clone of Codex AgentControl, budgets, and residency.

sources.behavior: A detached watcher subscribes to child status until final state and rechecks state when a subscription closes.
sources.keydex_decision: Adopt subscription-first notification with durable repository snapshots as the recovery source.

sources.behavior: Built-in default, explorer, and worker roles encourage parallel exploration and explicit worker ownership.
sources.keydex_decision: Adopt immutable Explorer and Worker presets and parallel instances; enforce Explorer read-only at the tool layer.

sources.behavior: AgentStatus exposes initialization, running, interrupted, completed, errored, shutdown, and not-found states.
sources.keydex_decision: Use explicit observable states but separate instance state, run lifecycle, and orthogonal blocking reason.

sources.behavior: The historical Task tool accepts a self-contained description and prompt and returns one final response without follow-up.
sources.keydex_decision: Adopt the simple task-only call and final-report boundary; add addressable state and in-run intervention.

sources.behavior: The child runs an independent model loop, emits progress, and must finish with an assistant message used as the result.
sources.keydex_decision: Adopt independent child conversation context and a final assistant report; keep progress in the child Session.

sources.behavior: Task removes itself from child tools, supports internal parallel execution, and maps completion to tool_result.
sources.keydex_decision: Adopt no nested delegation and correlated final tool results; do not hide the lifecycle inside a non-addressable call.

sources.behavior: task and atask directly invoke a child graph and map its last message into a ToolMessage.
sources.keydex_decision: Keep the concise final-result experience but reject direct child invocation as the runtime boundary.

sources.behavior: The dynamic sub-agent uses the main model and tools, awaits ainvoke directly, and extracts final text.
sources.keydex_decision: Reuse the Worker capability-cloning idea; replace direct await with a durable Runtime handle and Run state.
